text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, August 25. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and Sarah wanting to work on her design course.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Catan is always a good time. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Good way to wrap up the day. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan's team played a match and won 3-2! The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. That's a big step. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Prepping school lunches for the week. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Yum, that sounds delicious! How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Toddlers are full of energy. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Let's get that resolved. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Relaxation mode active. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: I've got the schedule covered. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Let's organize the menu. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: The lawn mower is having issues starting. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. I can help troubleshoot that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
